title: Signal’s Meredith Whittaker wants you to remember that AI chatbots ‘are not your friends’
summary: Signal's Meredith Whittaker cautions against anthropomorphizing AI chatbots, emphasizing they are not friends, conscious beings, or sentient entities. The warning highlights the importance of maintaining realistic expectations about AI interactions. This matters as responsible AI literacy becomes increasingly critical as chatbots proliferate.
content: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”

zh.title: Signal的Meredith Whittaker提醒你：AI聊天机器人"不是你的朋友"
zh.summary: Signal的Meredith Whittaker警告人们不要过度拟人化AI聊天机器人，强调它们既不是朋友，也不是有意识的生物或有感知能力的实体。这一警告强调了对AI互动保持现实期望的重要性。这很重要，因为随着聊天机器人的普遍应用，负责任的AI素养变得越来越关键。

title: In the Weights is your new AI-centric vanity search
summary: In the Weights is a new AI-centric vanity search tool that generates personalized scores for users. The tool exemplifies the growing trend of AI-powered personal analytics and ranking services. This matters as it demonstrates novel applications of AI in creating unique user engagement experiences.
content: So ... what's your In the Weights score?

zh.title: In the Weights是你新的以AI为中心的虚荣搜索工具
zh.summary: In the Weights是一个新型的以AI为中心的虚荣搜索工具，为用户生成个性化评分。该工具体现了AI驱动的个人分析和排名服务的增长趋势。这很重要，因为它展示了AI在创造独特用户参与体验中的新应用。

title: The Atlantic created a searchable database of the music used to train AI
summary: The Atlantic created a searchable database of four music datasets used to train AI models, encompassing over 30 million tracks after Google and Stability AI confirmed using them. The project increases transparency around AI training practices and the massive scale of data required. This matters as it reveals the scope of creative content being used in AI development.
content:
Atlantic reporter Alex Reisner recently uncovered four datasets of music being used to train AI models and made them fully searchable for the public. Two of the sets are absolutely enormous at 12 million and 9 million tracks. The other two are much smaller, but still represent a significant amount of training data at over 100,000 songs each.
According to Reisner, the sets have been downloaded thousands of times and, while it's impossible to know exactly who has used them, Google and Stability have both confirmed they have in research papers. Some of the sources, like the Free Music Archive dataset, are free to stream for personal use but re …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 大西洋创建了用于训练AI的音乐可搜索数据库
zh.summary: 大西洋创建了四个用于训练AI模型的音乐数据集的可搜索数据库，包含超过3000万首音乐，此前Google和Stability AI确认使用了这些数据。该项目增加了对AI训练实践和所需数据规模的透明度。这很重要，因为它揭示了在AI开发中使用创意内容的广泛程度。

title: Founders Fund’s outlier bet on humanely killed fish
summary: Venture capital firm Founders Fund has backed Shinkei, which developed Poseidon, a refrigerator-sized robot designed to kill fish quickly and humanely. The technology addresses animal welfare concerns in commercial fishing by offering a more humane alternative to traditional slaughter methods.
content: Shinkei makes a refrigerator-sized robot called Poseidon to kill fish quickly and humanely.

zh.title: 创始人基金对人道杀鱼的另类押注
zh.summary: 风险投资公司创始人基金支持了Shinkei公司，该公司开发了Poseidon机器人，这是一台冰箱大小的机器，设计用来快速人道地杀死鱼类。这项技术通过提供比传统屠宰方法更人道的替代方案，解决了商业捕鱼中的动物福利问题。

title: Nobel laureate John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for rival Anthropic
summary: Nobel laureate John Jumper is joining Anthropic after leaving Google DeepMind, continuing a trend of senior researchers departing the AI leader. The move underscores intensifying competition for elite talent in artificial intelligence and Anthropic's growing prominence in the sector.
content: Jumper isn't the only big name leaving Google DeepMind.

zh.title: 诺贝尔奖得主约翰·朱珀从DeepMind离职加入竞争对手Anthropic
zh.summary: 诺贝尔奖得主约翰·朱珀从谷歌DeepMind离职后加入Anthropic，延续了资深研究人员离开这家AI领导者的趋势。此举突显了人工智能领域对顶级人才竞争的加剧和Anthropic在该行业日益增长的影响力。

title: Musician and YouTuber Hainbach on ‘Breath of the Wild’ and Swiss Army Knives
summary: German experimental composer Hainbach discusses his unconventional approach to music production using salvaged laboratory equipment and nuclear-testing gear, describing it as the "Dark Souls of synthesis." His prolific output—including six albums in 2025—demonstrates the viability of challenging production techniques.
content:
Indulging in the “Dark Souls of synthesis.” | Image: Aleksander Stojanov / Hainbach	

Stefan Paul Goetsch, better known as Hainbach, is a German experimental composer, artist, and YouTuber who is perhaps most famous for making music with laboratory equipment and scientific instruments. He describes it as being like the "Dark Souls of synthesis." Despite using "hard mode" production techniques that often rely on telephone line testing equipment and gear salvaged from nuclear testing facilities, Hainbach is also incredibly prolific, releasing six albums in 2025 alone, along with a handful of singles and EPs. His latest, Gentle Hum, is a collaboration with Ah! Kosmos (Turkish composer, Başak Günak). The album is a melancholic co …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 音乐家和YouTuber Hainbach谈《塞尔达传说：荒野之息》和瑞士军刀
zh.summary: 德国实验作曲家Hainbach讨论了他使用废旧实验室设备和核测试设备进行音乐制作的非常规方法，称其为合成器的"暗黑灵魂"。他多产的创作成果——包括2025年发行的六张专辑——展示了具有挑战性制作技术的可行性。

title: Every new iOS 27 feature that’s worth knowing about
summary: iOS 27 introduces several practical features beyond Apple's prominently marketed Siri AI and Apple Intelligence enhancements. These less publicized updates provide meaningful functionality improvements worth exploring.
content: While it's not flashy like Apple’s new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence upgrades, there are still a number of additions to iOS 27 worth looking at.

zh.title: iOS 27 的每个值得了解的新功能
zh.summary: iOS 27 推出了多项实用功能，超越了 Apple 大力推销的 Siri AI 和 Apple Intelligence 增强功能。这些鲜为人知的更新提供了值得探索的有意义的功能改进。

title: Moves of the Diamond Hand is an unfinished, irresistibly weird dice-based RPG
summary: Moves of the Diamond Hand is an early-access dice-based RPG from musician and designer Cosmo D that combines strange conversations and randomized outcomes in a gritty, 2000s-era immersive sim aesthetic. The game offers creative gameplay despite being unfinished, with narrative mysteries set to resolve in 2027.
content:
From its opening minutes, Moves of the Diamond Hand is upfront about what it offers: You're going to have a lot of strange conversations, and you're going to roll a lot of dice. Get on board with this proposition, and the reward is one of the most creative roleplaying games I've seen in years, even if its many mysteries won't be resolved until 2027.
Moves of the Diamond Hand is an Early Access videogame available on PC, macOS, and steamOS (including the Steam Deck, where I played it) from musician and game designer Cosmo D. The game looks and feels like a 2000s-era first-person RPG or immersive sim: environments are grimy, stark, and blocky …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《钻石手的招式》是一款未完成、不可抗拒的奇异骰子RPG
zh.summary: 《钻石手的招式》是来自音乐家和设计师 Cosmo D 的早期访问骰子 RPG，结合了奇异的对话和随机化的结果，具有粗糙的 2000 年代沉浸式模拟美学。尽管游戏未完成，但它提供了富有创意的游戏体验，其叙事谜团将在 2027 年解决。

title: Toy Story has the right take on tech
summary: The Verge's weekly Installer column surveys the cultural intersection of technology and everyday life, covering major industry developments like cryptocurrency controversies alongside consumer tech updates including iOS 27's improved Siri and new camera gear. The roundup reflects how emerging technologies shape entertainment, business, and personal technology choices.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 133, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, happy belated Juneteenth, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about Sam Bankman-Fried and PE Guy and admin nights (which we should totally all do together one of these days), listening to Paul McCartney on Song Exploder, trudging through the bugs of the iOS 27 beta in order to use the good new Siri, once again trying and failing to switch to YouTube Music, free trial-hopping my way through the World Cup, finally upgrading my camera setup with the E …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《玩具总动员》对科技的正确看法
zh.summary: The Verge的每周Installer专栏探讨科技与日常生活的文化交集,涵盖加密货币争议等主要行业动态,以及iOS 27改进的Siri和新相机设备等消费者科技更新。该综述反映了新兴技术如何塑造娱乐、商业和个人科技选择。

title: The UK will scan asylum-seekers’ faces for age checks—despite knowing the tech is flawed
summary: The UK government is implementing facial recognition technology to verify asylum seekers' ages despite documented evidence that the technology produces significant errors with life-altering consequences. The initiative underscores the risks of deploying automated systems in high-stakes immigration proceedings where accuracy is critical.
content: Tests of age-verification technology show the risks of life-altering errors.

zh.title: 英国将扫描难民面部进行年龄检查——尽管知道该技术有缺陷
zh.summary: 英国政府正在实施面部识别技术来验证寻求庇护者的年龄,尽管有明确证据表明该技术存在重大错误且后果严重。该举措凸显了在高风险移民诉讼程序中部署自动化系统的风险,因为准确性至关重要。

title: SwitchBot’s Standing Circulator Fan is worth fighting for
summary: The SwitchBot Standing Circulator Fan is a battery-powered 3D fan that tilts in multiple directions to circulate air throughout a room, featuring a quiet motor and multi-hour battery life. The device can convert between desktop and standing modes and includes an integrated nightlight, while supporting smart home integration, making it a compelling alternative to traditional fan options.
content:
I’m a fan.	

I can't remember the last time I got excited about a fan. Normally, I just buy whatever Vornado or Dreo model fits my budget, but that was before I started testing the battery-powered Standing Circulator Fan from SwitchBot.
As the name indicates, the SwitchBot fan is a 3D circulator - a fancy way of saying that it can tilt up, down, left, and right to push a decent amount air around a room. It looks okay, despite all the plastic, is relatively quiet, runs for hours on battery, has an integrated nightlight, transforms from a desktop to standing fan in seconds, and works on its own or as part of a smart home. There's a lot to like here.
Over …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: SwitchBot直立循环扇值得入手
zh.summary: SwitchBot直立循环扇是一款电池驱动的3D风扇，可向多个方向倾斜以在房间中循环空气，配备安静马达和超长电池续航。该设备可在桌面和直立模式间切换，内置夜灯功能，支持智能家居集成，是传统风扇的绝佳替代方案。

title: He made your free video player run smoothly. Now he’s doing that for robots.
summary: Jean-Baptiste Kempf, known for his open-source work on video players, is launching Kyber, an infrastructure platform for real-time remote device control. This represents his expansion from consumer media software to robotics infrastructure.
content: French serial entrepreneur and open-source legend Jean-Baptiste Kempf has been building Kyber, an infrastructure layer to control remote devices in real time.

zh.title: 他让你的免费视频播放器运行流畅。现在他正为机器人做同样的事。
zh.summary: Jean-Baptiste Kempf以其在开源视频播放器方面的工作而著称,现在正推出Kyber,这是一个用于实时远程设备控制的基础设施平台。这代表了他从消费者媒体软件向机器人基础设施的扩展。
